channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tottenham vs Nottm Forest Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Tottenham vs Nottm Forest live streams online and from anywhere, as two struggling Premier League sides contest a relegation six-pointer.

item.title: The Best Subscription-Free Home Security Cameras I've Tried
item.description: You don’t have to upload your video to the cloud or pay a monthly fee to secure your home. These security cameras record locally.

item.title: ‘It’s irritatingly good at it’: The Mercedes-Benz CLA has the best autonomous parking feature I’ve ever tried — plus one trick that's even more useful
item.description: The Mercedes-Benz CLA is bristling with technology, but I didn't realize how good its autonomous parking features were until I lived with it.

item.title: 5 smart ways to get more out of Google’s Gemini
item.description: From “vibe drawing” and deep research reports to custom Gems and app-building tools, Gemini’s latest features show how fast Google’s AI is evolving—and how to actually use it in your daily work. This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps.

item.title: DLSS 5, fonction Gemini gratuite, Smart Bench Decathlon : les infos tech qu’il ne fallait pas rater – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Cette semaine, l’actualité tech a été marquée par plusieurs événements importants comme le DLSS 5 de Nvidia, le lancement d'un Smart Bench de Decathlon ou la gratuité d'une fonction Gemini. Voici ce qu'il ne fallait pas manquer.

item.title: How to watch MotoGP live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch MotoGP for free. Live stream the 2026 MotoGP World Championship for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch EFL Cup final for free. Live stream Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final for free.

item.title: Give Your Phone a Huge (and Free) Upgrade by Switching to Another Keyboard
item.description: Change up the default keyboard in Android and iOS and feel the benefit.

item.title: Feyenoord vs Ajax Live Streams: How to watch Dutch Eredivisie 2025/26 online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch live streams of Feyenoord vs Ajax from anywhere in the world, as De Klassieker takes center stage in the Dutch Eredivisie 2025/26.

item.title: Ce TV Philips OLED Ambilight 144 Hz de 55″ cumule les réductions pour un total de 1 020 € d’économies
item.description: C'est un téléviseur polyvalent qui va régaler aussi bien les cinéphiles que les sérivores et les gamers : le Philips 55OLED850, un modèle OLED 4K de 55 pouces qui revient à 979 euros au lieu de 1 999 euros.

item.title: Meilleurs smartphones haut de gamme 2026 : nos recommandations et tests
item.description: Vous partez en quête du smartphone de vos rêves et vous avez un budget illimité pour vous l'offrir ? Bienvenue sur notre sélection de smartphones haut de gamme, tous testés et approuvés, pour vous aider dans votre choix.

item.title: 12 garden gadgets to give your outside space an instant lift — from just £10
item.description: Spring is in the air, and it's time to give your garden some love.

item.title: I asked the cast of Ready or Not 2: Here I Come which David Cronenberg movie you need to stream ASAP — but I totally disagree with their choice
item.description: Every David Cronenberg movie is a certified banger, but if you're going to stream one after Ready or Not 2, don't pick the one that the cast recommends.

item.title: We gave the 'best-in-class' Insta360 X5 a full five stars out of five — and now it's on sale at Amazon
item.description: The lowest price yet on the five-star rated Insta360 X5 360 action cam – now at Amazon

item.title: The building code rule that lets Seattle turn forgotten lots into housing
item.description: Rethinking the building code to allow single-stairwell buildings brought more small-lot, mid-rise apartments to the city—and sparked a wider reform movement. Fire officials and pro-density urbanists are often at loggerheads. This is especially evident in notoriously car-centric Los Angeles, where a firefighters’ union spent six figures opposing active mobility measures. The two camps can have different ideas of acceptable risks and priorities....

item.title: 66 housing markets enter spring 2026 above a key inventory threshold that benefits homebuyers
item.description: Among the nation’s 200 largest housing markets, these metro areas have active inventory above 2019 pre-pandemic levels. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Arsenal vs Man City LIVE: Carabao Cup Final 2026 Build-Up, How to Watch & Stream Free
item.description: How to watch Arsenal vs Man City in the Carabao Cup Final 2026 as Mikel Arteta's side look to kickstart their quadruple bid with the opening trophy of the season.

item.title: 12 Best Coffee Subscriptions (2026), Tested by Caffeine Hounds
item.description: These services deliver freshly roasted, delicious coffee picks right to your door—each with its own twist.

item.title: Avis Proton VPN en 2026 : est-ce vraiment le champion de la confidentialité en ligne ?
item.description: Proton VPN fait partie des fournisseurs de VPN les plus réputés du marché, le plus souvent mis en lumière pour sa transparence et sa rigueur sur la protection des données personnelles. Mais la réputation suffit-elle ? Proton VPN peut-il vraiment répondre à vos attentes ? Réponse dans ce test.
